query:
SELECT 
  'orders' as table_name, COUNT(*) as row_count FROM orders
UNION ALL SELECT 'order_items', COUNT(*) FROM order_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'payments', COUNT(*) FROM payments
UNION ALL SELECT 'products', COUNT(*) FROM products
UNION ALL SELECT 'stamp_transactions', COUNT(*) FROM stamp_transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'workshop_bookings', COUNT(*) FROM workshop_bookings
UNION ALL SELECT 'reviews', COUNT(*) FROM reviews
UNION ALL SELECT 'event_orders', COUNT(*) FROM event_orders
UNION ALL SELECT 'guest_orders', COUNT(*) FROM guest_orders;
